events.title: Names, doors, and passwords
events.text: Your first week brings unfamiliar faces, mysterious cupboards, and more logins than any person should need.

choices.label: Take careful notes
choices.outcome: By Friday, you know where things live and who can explain the rest.

choices.label: Focus on meeting people
choices.outcome: You still get lost once, but someone always points you back.

choices.label: Keep your head down
choices.outcome: You avoid mistakes, though the workplace remains a little mysterious.

events.title: The problem at closing time
events.text: Just as the day should end, a complicated problem lands directly in front of you.

choices.label: Stay and see it through
choices.outcome: It takes hours, but the problem finally gives way.

choices.label: Call in the right people
choices.outcome: A small team untangles it faster than any one person could.

choices.label: Document it for tomorrow
choices.outcome: The morning crew appreciates the notes, if not the surprise.

events.title: The mistake everyone can see
events.text: A decision you made has caused a visible problem. It is fixable, but no longer private.

choices.label: Own it and propose a fix
choices.outcome: The correction works. People remember the recovery more than the error.

choices.label: Quietly patch it
choices.outcome: The patch holds, though the worry follows you home.

choices.label: Point to a confusing process
choices.outcome: The process was confusing, but the room hears an excuse.

events.title: Coffee with a veteran
events.text: An experienced colleague offers to show you the parts of the job nobody writes down.

choices.label: Make time for the guidance
choices.outcome: Their stories save you months of avoidable trial and error.

choices.label: Learn independently
choices.outcome: You choose the slower road, but it is unmistakably your own.

events.title: A number across the table
events.text: Your review goes well. This may be the moment to discuss what your work is worth.

choices.label: Make a case with evidence
choices.outcome: The preparation pays off with a meaningful raise.

choices.label: Ask for a much bigger jump
choices.outcome: The full request is declined, but your confidence earns a smaller increase.

choices.label: Wait until next time
choices.outcome: The review ends warmly, with the number unchanged.

events.title: The tempting shortcut
events.text: A colleague suggests skipping a safeguard to finish a project early. It would probably go unnoticed.

choices.label: Insist on doing it properly
choices.outcome: The launch is later, but everyone can stand behind it.

choices.label: Take the shortcut
choices.outcome: The project lands on time. A nagging uncertainty remains underneath the celebration.

choices.label: Ask a manager to decide
choices.outcome: The pressure moves upward, and the safeguard stays.

events.title: The all-hands invitation
events.text: A sudden meeting reveals that several roles are being removed, including yours.

choices.label: Call people before leaving
choices.outcome: The news hurts, but a handful of leads give the next morning direction.

choices.label: Take the severance and breathe
choices.outcome: For once, your calendar is empty. The uncertainty and relief arrive together.

choices.label: Challenge the decision
choices.outcome: The role still ends, but the improved exit package helps.

events.title: Running on the reserve light
events.text: Small tasks feel enormous, and another full week waits on the other side of Sunday.

choices.label: Use some leave and recover
choices.outcome: Rest does not solve everything, but your thoughts become your own again.

choices.label: Set a firm boundary
choices.outcome: A few tasks move elsewhere. The world continues to turn.

choices.label: Push through the deadline
choices.outcome: The deadline passes. Your exhaustion does not.
